allow: Bash(python -c "import zipfile,xml.dom.minidom as m; z=zipfile.ZipFile\('Blood_Donation_App_Technical_Blueprint.docx'\); bad=z.testzip\(\); print\('zip ok' if bad is None else bad\); [m.parseString\(z.read\(n\)\) for n in z.namelist\(\) if n.endswith\('.xml'\)]; print\('all xml well-formed'\); print\('files:', len\(z.namelist\(\)\)\)")
